cards.name: Day 16: Foresight Ventures - Tony Cheng
cards.desc:
**Score:** 92/100  
**Fund:** Foresight Ventures  
**Partner:** Tony Cheng (Managing Partner)  
**Email:** tony@foresightventures.com  
**Stage:** Seed to Series B  
**Check:** $500K–$5M  
**Location:** New York / Singapore  

**Thesis:** Connecting Eastern and Western crypto ecosystems. Web3 gaming + AI. Research-driven with owned media network (The Block, Foresight News).  

**Outreach Angle:** East-West bridge narrative. AI + Web3 intersection. Bitget ecosystem potential.  

**Key Triggers:**
- Web3 gaming traction
- AI integration with blockchain
- Cross-border expansion (Asia/US)
- Media amplification via The Block  

**Background:** Former Sequoia Capital China investor, Head of Corporate Development at Bitget Exchange. Active on Twitter/X @TonyCheng1992.  

**Email Draft:** /deliverables/day16_vc_batch/emails/foresight_ventures.txt

cards.name: Day 16: Venture Reality Fund - Tipatat Chennavasin
cards.desc:
**Score:** 90/100  
**Fund:** The Venture Reality Fund (VRF)  
**Partner:** Tipatat Chennavasin (Co-Founder & GP)  
**Email:** tipatat@thevrfund.com  
**Stage:** Pre-seed to Series A  
**Check:** $100K–$500K  
**Location:** Redwood City, CA  

**Thesis:** AI & Spatial Computing. VR/AR/MR investments across gaming, media, entertainment. Multiple Meta exits.  

**Outreach Angle:** Spatial gaming innovation. AI-generated immersive content. Reference Meta portfolio exits (Beat Games, Supernatural).  

**Key Triggers:**
- VR/AR gaming innovation
- Spatial computing applications
- AI-generated immersive content
- Metaverse infrastructure plays  

**Background:** Stanford grad, pioneer in VR/AR investing. Thought leader, active on Twitter @tipatat.  

**Email Draft:** /deliverables/day16_vc_batch/emails/venture_reality_fund.txt

cards.name: Day 16: Asymmetric - Joe McCann
cards.desc:
**Score:** 88/100  
**Fund:** Asymmetric  
**Partner:** Joe McCann (Founder, CEO, CIO)  
**Email:** joe@asymmetric.financial  
**Stage:** Pre-seed to Series A  
**Check:** $10K–$1M  
**Location:** Miami, FL  

**Thesis:** Blockchain-agnostic Web3/crypto across DeFi, mobile, gaming. Bitcoin L2 vertical fund + hedge fund strategies.  

**Outreach Angle:** Technical depth and contrarian thesis. Bold tokenomics. Bitcoin L2 gaming infrastructure.  

**Key Triggers:**
- Bitcoin L2 infrastructure
- DeFi gaming mechanics
- Novel tokenomics design
- Technical innovation  

**Background:** 24+ years tech/hedge fund/crypto experience. Former Microsoft, quant trader. Extremely active on Twitter @joemccann.  

**Email Draft:** /deliverables/day16_vc_batch/emails/asymmetric.txt

cards.name: Day 16: Flori Ventures - Maria Alegre
cards.desc:
**Score:** 87/100  
**Fund:** Flori Ventures  
**Partner:** Maria Alegre (Co-Founder & Managing Partner)  
**Email:** maria@floriventures.com  
**Stage:** Pre-seed, Seed  
**Check:** $100K–$500K  
**Location:** San Francisco, CA  

**Thesis:** Celo ecosystem seed fund. Financial inclusion through Web3. Gaming-native team.  

**Outreach Angle:** Gaming operator to gaming founder. Chartboost legacy reference. Mobile + blockchain convergence.  

**Key Triggers:**
- Mobile gaming + blockchain
- Financial inclusion through games
- Celo ecosystem alignment
- Emerging markets focus  

**Background:** Co-founded Chartboost (60K+ games, 12B sessions/month). Forbes 30 Under 30. Ex-Tapulous (acquired by Disney).  

**Email Draft:** /deliverables/day16_vc_batch/emails/flori_ventures.txt

cards.name: Day 16: CMT Digital - Charlie Sandor
cards.desc:
**Score:** 85/100  
**Fund:** CMT Digital  
**Partner:** Charlie Sandor (Investment Partner)  
**Email:** csandor@cmt.digital  
**Stage:** Seed to Series B  
**Check:** $500K–$5M  
**Location:** Chicago / New York  

**Thesis:** Early blockchain infrastructure. One of earliest crypto allocators. Just raised $136M Fund IV (Nov 2025).  

**Outreach Angle:** Infrastructure-first. Institutional adoption narrative. Recent fund close means active deployment.  

**Key Triggers:**
- Blockchain infrastructure
- Institutional adoption
- Regulatory-compliant design
- Trading/gaming convergence  

**Background:** Harvard grad. Investment team member focused on early-stage crypto infrastructure. Part of 25+ world-class team.  

**Email Draft:** /deliverables/day16_vc_batch/emails/cmt_digital.txt
